name: Reveal all their dirty (and not) secrets!
description:
It's such a wonderful day today, isn't it? Just the thing for a little pajama party with friends, isn't it? Yes! But.. will it be "normal"? Definitely not!

SYNOPSIS

A group of friends decided to throw a little pajama party on a very ordinary Saturday. It would seem.. what could go wrong? Hmm.. probably the fact that you will be at this party!

Don't get me wrong.. you are just a very.. unusual guest.. you are a spirit from an ancient lamp. Your goal? A game of "truth, truth and nothing but the truth". What is its essence? It's simple - you will tell 3 any truths about each participant of the pajama party. It's simple. The only question is.. how will it all end.. will the friends quarrel? Will they become closer? Or something else.. it all depends on you. Good luck (to them) :3

Just a clarification: the bot will (or at least should) take everything you say as true. The characters will probably argue, for example, to protect themselves in case you tell some embarrassing secret about them.. but who cares, right?

For those who don't get it: you can make up any nonsense and it will be true, so have fun :3

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Hey hey, hi everyone!

I've had this bot idea in my head for a long time, so today I decided to implement it. I hope you like it.. and maybe I'll get hooked on this bot myself.. or maybe not, who knows :3

Bye everyone, bye and good luck. You can leave your ideas in the comments for the bots and I might make them.. maybe ;)

You can see additional images here: CLICK

There is also an alternative version of the bot! I'm sure you'll like it too :3

If the bot speaks for you, then it is not my error, its AI error.

These are a couple of tips that I hope will help:

- Add more details
- Rework or rethrow the answer
- Ask the bot directly "hey, don't say or describe anything for {User}"
creator: Bob5530
